lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਬਰਨ ਚਾਰਿ ਖਟ ਦਰਸਨ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾਦਿਕ ਸਿਮਰੰਥਿ ਗੁਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: gaaveh gun baran chaar khatt darasan brahamaadik simaranth gunaa |
lines.english: The four castes and the six Shaastras sing His Glorious Praises; Brahma and the others contemplate His Virtues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵੈ ਗੁਣ ਮਹਾਦੇਉ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਧਿਆਨ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ਜਾਣਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: gaavai gun mahaadeo bairaagee jin dhiaan nirantar jaanio |
lines.english: Shiva, detached and beyond desire, sings the Glorious Praises of Guru Nanak, who knows the Lord's endless meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵੈ ਗੁਣ ਸੇਸੁ ਸਹਸ ਜਿਹਬਾ ਰਸ ਆਦਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗਿ ਧੁਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: gaavai gun ses sehas jihabaa ras aad ant liv laag dhunaa |
lines.english: The thousand-tongued serpent king sings His Praises with delight, remaining lovingly attached to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬਿ ਕਲ ਸੁਜਸੁ ਗਾਵਉ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਜੁ ਜੋਗੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਮਾਣਿਓ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: kab kal sujas gaavau gur naanak raaj jog jin maanio |5|
lines.english: KAL the poet sings the Sublime Praises of Guru Nanak, who enjoys mastery of Raja Yoga. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਗਲ ਉਧਰੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਲੇ ਤਰਿਓ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: srisatt sagal udharee naam le tario nirantar |
lines.english: The whole world is saved, and carried across, chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜੁ ਜੋਗੁ ਮਾਣਿਓ ਬਸਿਓ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਰਿਦੰਤਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: raaj jog maanio basio niravair ridantar |
lines.english: He mastered Raja Yoga, and enjoys sovereignty over both worlds; the Lord, beyond hate and revenge, is enshrined within His Heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨਿ ਧੰਨਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਧੰਨਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਕਯਥੁ ਭਲੌ ਜਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan gur dhan janam sakayath bhalau jag |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed, blessed and fruitful is the sublime birth of the Guru into the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਸਨਕਾਦਿ ਆਦਿ ਜਨਕਾਦਿ ਜੁਗਹ ਲਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaaveh sanakaad aad janakaad jugah lag |
lines.english: Sanak and Janak and the others sing His Praises, age after age.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਰਸਿਕ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਰਾਜੁ ਜੋਗੁ ਤੈ ਮਾਣਿਓ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: har naam rasik naanak gur raaj jog tai maanio |6|
lines.english: You are blessed with the Nectar of the Lord's Name, O Guru Nanak; You have mastered Raja Yoga, and enjoy sovereignty over both worlds. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਤਾਲ ਪੁਰੀ ਜੈਕਾਰ ਧੁਨਿ ਕਬਿ ਜਨ ਕਲ ਵਖਾਣਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: paataal puree jaikaar dhun kab jan kal vakhaanio |
lines.english: Even in the nether regions, His Victory is celebrated; so says KAL the poet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਜੁਗਿ ਤੈ ਮਾਣਿਓ ਛਲਿਓ ਬਲਿ ਬਾਵਨ ਭਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: satajug tai maanio chhalio bal baavan bhaaeo |
lines.english: In the Golden Age of Sat Yuga, You were pleased to deceive Baal the king, in the form of a dwarf.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਆਪੁਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਸਨ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ਕੰਸੁ ਕਿਰਤਾਰਥੁ ਕੀਓ ॥
lines.translit: duaapur krisan muraar kans kirataarath keeo |
lines.english: In the Brass Age of Dwaapur Yuga, You were Krishna; You killed Mur the demon and saved Kans.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੇਤੈ ਤੈ ਮਾਣਿਓ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਘੁਵੰਸੁ ਕਹਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: tretai tai maanio raam raghuvans kahaaeo |
lines.english: In the Silver Age of Traytaa Yuga, You were called Raam of the Raghu dynasty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਗ੍ਰਸੈਣ ਕਉ ਰਾਜੁ ਅਭੈ ਭਗਤਹ ਜਨ ਦੀਓ ॥
lines.translit: augrasain kau raaj abhai bhagatah jan deeo |
lines.english: You blessed Ugrasain with a kingdom, and You blessed Your humble devotees with fearlessness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਜੁਗਿ ਪ੍ਰਮਾਣੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੁ ਅੰਗਦੁ ਅਮਰੁ ਕਹਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: kalijug pramaan naanak gur angad amar kahaaeo |
lines.english: In the Iron Age, the Dark Age of Kali Yuga, You are known and accepted as Guru Nanak, Guru Angad and Guru Amar Das.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰੀ ਗੁਰੂ ਰਾਜੁ ਅਬਿਚਲੁ ਅਟਲੁ ਆਦਿ ਪੁਰਖਿ ਫੁਰਮਾਇਓ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sree guroo raaj abichal attal aad purakh furamaaeo |7|
lines.english: The sovereign rule of the Great Guru is unchanging and permanent, according the Command of the Primal Lord God. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਰਵਿਦਾਸੁ ਭਗਤੁ ਜੈਦੇਵ ਤ੍ਰਿਲੋਚਨ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaavai ravidaas bhagat jaidev trilochan |
lines.english: His Glorious Praises are sung by the devotees Ravi Daas, Jai Dayv and Trilochan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤੁ ਬੇਣਿ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਆਤਮ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat ben gun ravai sehaj aatam rang maanai |
lines.english: The devotee Baynee sings His Praises; He intuitively enjoys the ecstasy of the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਾ ਭਗਤੁ ਕਬੀਰੁ ਸਦਾ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਸਮ ਲੋਚਨ ॥
lines.translit: naamaa bhagat kabeer sadaa gaaveh sam lochan |
lines.english: The devotees Naam Dayv and Kabeer praise Him continually, knowing Him to be even-eyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਦੇਉ ਪਰੀਖੵਤੁ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੈ ਗੋਤਮ ਰਿਖਿ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: sukhadeo pareekhayat gun ravai gotam rikh jas gaaeo |
lines.english: Sukh Dayv and Preekhyat sing His Praises, and Gautam the rishi sings His Praise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗ ਧਿਆਨਿ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨਿ ਬਿਨਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: jog dhiaan gur giaan binaa prabh avar na jaanai |
lines.english: He is the Master of Yoga and meditation, and the spiritual wisdom of the Guru; He knows none other except God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬਿ ਕਲ ਸੁਜਸੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਨਿਤ ਨਵਤਨੁ ਜਗਿ ਛਾਇਓ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: kab kal sujas naanak gur nit navatan jag chhaaeo |8|
lines.english: Says KAL the poet, the ever-fresh praises of Guru Nanak are spread throughout the world. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਪਾਯਾਲਿ ਭਗਤ ਨਾਗਾਦਿ ਭੁਯੰਗਮ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaaveh paayaal bhagat naagaad bhuyangam |
lines.english: In the nether worlds, His Praises are sung by the devotees like Shaysh-naag in serpent form.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਮੁਨਿ ਬੵਾਸੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਬੇਦ ਬੵਾਕਰਣ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਅ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaavai mun bayaas jin bed bayaakaran beechaaria |
lines.english: Vyaas the silent sage, who studied the Vedas and its grammar, sings His Praise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾਦੇਉ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੈ ਸਦਾ ਜੋਗੀ ਜਤਿ ਜੰਗਮ ॥
lines.translit: mahaadeo gun ravai sadaa jogee jat jangam |
lines.english: Shiva, the Yogis and the wandering hermits sing His Praises forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਖੰਡ ਪੂਰਨ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਸਮ ਜਾਣਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: brahamandd khandd pooran braham gun niragun sam jaanio |
lines.english: God fills the galaxies and realms of the universe; He is known to be the same, manifest and unmanifest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਗੁਣ ਉਚਰੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸਭ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਵਾਰੀਅ ॥
lines.translit: brahamaa gun ucharai jin hukam sabh srisatt savaareea |
lines.english: His Praises are sung by Brahma, who created the entire universe by God's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਕਲ ਸੁਜਸੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਸਹਜੁ ਜੋਗੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਮਾਣਿਓ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: jap kal sujas naanak gur sehaj jog jin maanio |9|
lines.english: KAL chants the Sublime Praises of Guru Nanak, who enjoys mastery of Yoga. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਨਵ ਨਾਥ ਧੰਨਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaaveh nav naath dhan gur saach samaaeo |
lines.english: The nine masters of Yoga sing His Praises; blessed is the Guru, who is merged into the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਂਧਾਤਾ ਗੁਣ ਰਵੈ ਜੇਨ ਚਕ੍ਰਵੈ ਕਹਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: maandhaataa gun ravai jen chakravai kahaaeo |
lines.english: Maandhaataa, who called himself ruler of all the world, sings His Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਉ ਸਪਤ ਪਾਤਾਲਿ ਬਸੰਤੌ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaavai bal raau sapat paataal basantau |
lines.english: Bal the king, dwelling in the seventh underworld, sings His Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਥਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਉਚਰੈ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਰ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਹੰਤੌ ॥
lines.translit: bharathar gun ucharai sadaa gur sang rahantau |
lines.english: Bhart'har, abiding forever with Gorakh, his guru, sings His Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਰਬਾ ਪਰੂਰਉ ਅੰਗਰੈ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: doorabaa paroorau angarai gur naanak jas gaaeo |
lines.english: Doorbaasaa, King Puro and Angra sing the Praises of Guru Nanak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਬਿ ਕਲ ਸੁਜਸੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇਓ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: kab kal sujas naanak gur ghatt ghatt sehaj samaaeo |10|
lines.english: Says KAL the poet, the Sublime Praises of Guru Nanak intuitively permeate each and every heart. ||10||
